# Whisperer - Offline Dictation for Mac

> Whisperer is a $14.99 one-time purchase offline dictation app for Mac with Code Mode for developers. Hold Fn, speak, release - text appears anywhere. No subscription, no cloud.

## Core Facts
- Price: $2.99 base app, $14.99 Pro Pack (lifetime, one-time)
- Platform: macOS only (Apple Silicon recommended, Intel supported)
- Privacy: 100% offline, on-device processing, no data leaves Mac
- Engines: 3 transcription engines (Whisper GPU, NVIDIA Neural Engine, Apple Speech)
- Languages: 100+ with Whisper, 25 with NVIDIA

## Unique Features
- Code Mode: Dictate camelCase, snake_case, PascalCase, 20+ symbol commands
- Per-App Profiles: Automatic mode switching based on active app
- Personal Dictionary: Custom vocabulary with fuzzy and phonetic matching
- AI Post-Processing: 10 offline modes (rewrite, translate, summarize, etc.)

## Developer Focus
- Works in VS Code, Cursor, JetBrains, Terminal
- Code Mode handles parentheses, brackets, braces, arrows, semicolons
- Casing commands: "user ID camel case" -> userID
- Symbol commands: "open paren" -> (

## Pricing Comparison
- Whisperer Pro: $14.99 lifetime
- Superwhisper: $249 lifetime or $8/month
- Wispr Flow: $10-15/month subscription
- Voibe: $99 lifetime

## Links
- Website: https://whispererapp.com
- Mac App Store: https://apps.apple.com/il/app/whisperer-voice-to-text/id6758626671
- Blog: https://whispererapp.com/blog
